headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Mondelez, McCormick, Post Holdings and The Chefs' Warehouse
summary: MDLZ, MKC, POST and CHEF are navigating inflation and shifting consumer demand through innovation and operational efficiency efforts.
